title: The 30 Foot Bride of Candy Rock
original_title: The 30 Foot Bride of Candy Rock
overview: In one of his rare performances without Bud Abbott, Lou Costello plays a rubbish collector and inventor. When radiation in a nearby cave turns his girlfriend into a giantess, antics ensue as he tries to shrink her using one of his inventions.
